unitTitle.zh-hk: 8.3 特徵多項式與對角化測試
unitTitle.zh-cn: 8.3 特征多项式与对角化测试

segments.cardTitle: Package the determinant test into one polynomial
segments.goal: Connect the null-space eigenvalue criterion with the characteristic polynomial definition.
beats: Recall that lambda is an eigenvalue exactly when det(A-lambda I)=0.
Replace lambda by an indeterminate x.
segments.animation: matrix A becomes A-xI, then the determinant becomes one polynomial

segments.cardTitle: Factor the polynomial to read the eigenvalues
segments.goal: Use the source-backed 2 by 2 matrix to show roots becoming eigenvalues.
segments.animation: factorization sends roots to a number-line view of eigenvalues

segments.cardTitle: A repeated root creates a multiplicity question
segments.goal: Show that algebraic multiplicity comes from the exponent in the characteristic polynomial.
segments.animation: two algebraic slots both labeled with eigenvalue 2

segments.cardTitle: The eigenspace dimension is a separate count
segments.goal: Compute the geometric multiplicity of the repeated root example.
segments.animation: one eigenspace line appears, contrasted against two algebraic slots

segments.cardTitle: Diagonalization succeeds only with enough eigendirections
segments.goal: State the dimension-sum test and contrast failure with a repeated-but-diagonalizable example.
beats: For B, m_g(2)=1 is not enough for a 2 by 2 basis.
For [[2,1,1],[1,2,1],[1,1,2]], the eigenspace dimensions are 1 and 2.
segments.animation: dimension blocks fail to fill n for B, then fill n for the 3 by 3 example

segments.cardTitle: Distinct eigenvalues are the fast sufficient test
segments.goal: Close with the source-backed theorem that n distinct eigenvalues guarantee diagonalizability.
beats: Eigenvectors of distinct eigenvalues are linearly independent.
An n by n matrix has at most n distinct eigenvalues.
If it has n distinct eigenvalues, those eigenvectors form a basis.
segments.animation: n distinct roots become n independent directions and then a diagonalization verdict

segments.cardTitle: 把行列式判準打包成一個多項式
segments.goal: 連接零空間特徵值判準與特徵多項式定義。
beats: 回顧 lambda 是特徵值，當且僅當 det(A-lambda I)=0。
把 lambda 換成未定元 x。
segments.animation: 矩陣 A 變成 A-xI，再由行列式變成一個多項式

segments.cardTitle: 因式分解多項式以讀出特徵值
segments.goal: 用來源支持的 2 乘 2 矩陣展示根如何成為特徵值。
beats: 把 4 與 -3 標示為根和特徵值。
segments.animation: 因式分解把根送到數線上的特徵值視圖

segments.goal: 展示代數重數來自特徵多項式中的指數。
segments.animation: 兩個代數位置都標記為特徵值 2

segments.cardTitle: 特徵空間維數是另一個計數
segments.goal: 計算重根例子的幾何重數。
segments.animation: 出現一條特徵空間直線，並與兩個代數位置對比

segments.cardTitle: 對角化只在特徵方向足夠時成功
segments.goal: 說明維數總和判準，並對比失敗例子與重根但可對角化的例子。
beats: 對 B，m_g(2)=1 不足以形成 2 乘 2 的基底。
segments.animation: B 的維數區塊填不滿 n，3 乘 3 例子的區塊則填滿 n

segments.cardTitle: 互異特徵值是快速充分測試
segments.goal: 用來源支持的定理收束：n 個互異特徵值保證可對角化。
beats: 互異特徵值所對應的特徵向量線性無關。
n 乘 n 矩陣最多有 n 個互異特徵值。
若它有 n 個互異特徵值，這些特徵向量形成基底。
mathBlocks: n\text{ 個互異特徵值}\Rightarrow\text{ 可對角化}
segments.animation: n 個互異根變成 n 個線性無關方向，再變成對角化判斷

segments.cardTitle: 把行列式判准打包成一个多项式
segments.goal: 连接零空间特征值判准与特征多项式定义。
beats: 回顾 lambda 是特征值，当且仅当 det(A-lambda I)=0。
把 lambda 换成未定元 x。
segments.animation: 矩阵 A 变成 A-xI，再由行列式变成一个多项式

segments.cardTitle: 因式分解多项式以读出特征值
segments.goal: 用来源支持的 2 乘 2 矩阵展示根如何成为特征值。
beats: 把 4 与 -3 标示为根和特征值。
segments.animation: 因式分解把根送到数线上的特征值视图

segments.goal: 展示代数重数来自特征多项式中的指数。
segments.animation: 两个代数位置都标记为特征值 2

segments.cardTitle: 特征空间维数是另一个计数
segments.goal: 计算重根例子的几何重数。
segments.animation: 出现一条特征空间直线，并与两个代数位置对比

segments.cardTitle: 对角化只在特征方向足够时成功
segments.goal: 说明维数总和判准，并对比失败例子与重根但可对角化的例子。
beats: 对 B，m_g(2)=1 不足以形成 2 乘 2 的基。
segments.animation: B 的维数区块填不满 n，3 乘 3 例子的区块则填满 n

segments.cardTitle: 互异特征值是快速充分测试
segments.goal: 用来源支持的定理收束：n 个互异特征值保证可对角化。
beats: 互异特征值所对应的特征向量线性无关。
n 乘 n 矩阵最多有 n 个互异特征值。
若它有 n 个互异特征值，这些特征向量形成基。
mathBlocks: n\text{ 个互异特征值}\Rightarrow\text{ 可对角化}
segments.animation: n 个互异根变成 n 个线性无关方向，再变成对角化判断

sourceScope: reference/MATH1030/MATH1030-Notes.pdf pages 202-206 for diagonalization criteria, distinct-eigenvalue theorem, algebraic/geometric multiplicity remarks, and repeated-root examples.

reference/MATH1030/1030gi-n07-03.pdf pages 1-5 for characteristic polynomial definition, root/eigenvalue theorem, characteristic-polynomial examples, distinct-eigenvalue test, and eigenspace-dimension criterion.
reference/MATH1030/1030gi-n07-02.pdf pages 2-5 for diagonalizability examples and the full-eigenbasis criterion.
excludedScope: Full Cayley-Hamilton proof and power-reduction applications; these remain in the article text but are not included in the short 8.3 clip.
A general symbolic characteristic-polynomial calculator widget; this pass is a curated Manim explanation rather than an open-ended computation surface.
Complex eigenvalue examples; the video stays with the real diagonalization criterion used by the current course note.
